content: Just as the English language learning definition of reflexion frames the practice of revisiting past writing outputs to refine communication clarity and accuracy, the Reflexion autonomous agent framework can borrow structured language learning reflection routines to improve LLM self-reflection mechanisms. Specifically, following the guided, iterative reflection prompts taught in high school writing workshops can help LLM self-reflection avoid vague self-critique and produce more targeted, actionable corrections to its outputs.
